category_sources: source_facts.description describes an interactive file-level Time Machine-like tool for ZFS/btrfs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives httm; current_curation.display-name also gives httm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies file-level Time Machine-like snapshot use for ZFS/btrfs; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools.
